rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The fix targets node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js — the published build, not source. Local source changes won't take effect unless rebuilt and republished.","scope":"bootstrap CLI"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"The model-resolution helper parseProviderModel expects 'provider/model' format (e.g. 'minimax/MiniMax-M1'). If model and provider come in separately, they must be combined before calling it.","scope":"bootstrapCommand model parsing"},{"kind":"decision","text":"The --provider flag was parsed from CLI args but silently dropped before being forwarded to bootstrapCommand — a classic argument-tunneling bug.","scope":"CLI argument passthrough"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The --model flag alone works because it encodes the provider as a prefix; --provider only matters when used alongside --model without the prefix.","scope":"bootstrap --model flag behavior"}]}
